meta.tagline: The clearest sip the mountains can give

home.heroTitle:
The clearest sip
the mountains can give
home.heroSubtitle: Suamsu is natural mineral water drawn from a protected source deep in Korea's pristine highlands. We bottle nature's quiet work, unchanged.
home.sectionAboutBody: From a small mountain village well to a global premium water brand — built carefully, one source at a time.
home.sectionProductBody: Water filtered for decades through deep granite layers, bottled close to the source with minimal human touch.
home.sectionDistributionBody: Anchored in domestic premium channels, we are expanding step by step into Middle Eastern and Southeast Asian markets.

about.title: A promise in every sip
about.lead: Suamsu (秀岩水) means "water rising from a remarkable rock." Our first responsibility, as a company, is to protect the source — and to deliver its taste, exactly as nature made it.
about.missionBody: Deliver water that is as close to nature as possible, in the most honest way possible. We choose verified water quality over loud marketing, and recyclable packaging over decorative excess.
about.visionBody: By 2030, Suamsu will be the trusted standard for Korean premium water across 10+ markets in Asia and the Middle East.

values.title: Nature, untouched
values.body: We run our own watershed protection zone and monitor the surrounding environment every single day.

values.title: Transparent quality
values.body: We publish per-lot water quality reports — anyone can look them up.

values.title: Sustainable distribution
values.body: Lighter PET, recyclable labels, and shorter logistics chains — we lower the footprint of every single bottle.

history.body: Source acquired in Gangwon Province; environmental impact study completed.
Production facility built; in-house quality management established.
Pilot launch through selected domestic channels.
Export-grade lineup developed; first overseas partners identified.

product.title: Where this water comes from
product.lead: Our source lies deep in the mountains of Gangwon Province, inside a protected zone with almost no human presence. Rainwater seeps through granite to over 200 metres below the surface — nature works slowly here.
product.sourceBody: We draw from a stable aquifer that holds steady at 8–10 °C year-round, located inside a protected zone with no industrial activity within a 5 km radius.
product.qualityNotes: * The values shown are representative test results. Per-lot reports are published on each product page.

quality.label: pH
quality.note: Slightly alkaline, smooth on the palate

product.processTitle: From source to bottle in 4 steps

process.title: Natural filtration
process.body: Decades of slow filtration through deep geological layers do the real work.

process.title: Deep-well intake
process.body: A closed pipe system draws water directly, with no exposure to surface contaminants.

process.title: Minimal processing
process.body: We apply only the lightest filtration and sterilisation — never disturbing the mineral balance.

process.title: Bottled at source
process.body: Filling happens on-site, preserving the water at its freshest.

distribution.title: From Korea to the world
distribution.lead: Suamsu is built around a phased distribution strategy — one that turns "well-made Korean water" into a global category standard.

phases.title: Domestic pilot
phases.body: Launch through premium grocery and online channels, alongside a recurring subscription offer.

phases.title: Asia expansion
phases.body: Enter Japan, Singapore, and Hong Kong via hospitality and F&B channels.

phases.title: Middle East entry
phases.body: Partner with premium channels and hospitality leaders in the UAE and Saudi Arabia.

phases.title: Global expansion
phases.body: Enter the European and North American premium mineral water category.

distribution.partnersBody: Premium hotels, fine-dining restaurants, airlines, and trusted local distributors. Partnership enquiries are always welcome.
distribution.logisticsBody: Short-haul transport from source to port, optimised container loading, and increasing use of recycled PET — every bottle carries a smaller footprint over time.

contact.title: Let's start a conversation
contact.lead: Distribution partnerships, hospitality programmes, media enquiries — all welcome. We reply within two business days.
contact.addressValue: Suamsu HQ, Seoul, Republic of Korea
contact.formNote: * This form is for demo purposes; submissions are not connected to a backend.

footer.tagline: The clearest sip the mountains can give.
